title: eragrostis elatior
intro: Eragrostis elatior, also known as tall love grass or tall wheat grass, is a perennial grass species native to Africa and Europe, characterized by its tall stems and feathery seed heads. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. Eragrostis elatior is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing coughs, and treating respiratory issues, as well as its ability to support digestive health. Herbal preparations of Eragrostis elatior can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
